subject: perf(content): narrow useMemo deps for cellInfoList and cellPositionLabel
body:
Both memos depended on the entire `layout` object, causing unnecessary
recomputation on non-structural changes (alignment, overlays, etc.).

- cellInfoList: [layout] → [layout.structure] (only reads structure)
- cellPositionLabel: [layout, ...] → [layout.type, layout.structure, ...]
  (only reads type and structure)

Tags: perf, content
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: content-tab-ux
Semver: patch
